special_mechanics.name: Wall Climb
special_mechanics.description: Spot can cling to and climb various objects by jumping up in front of them

special_mechanics.name: Projectile Attack
special_mechanics.description: Spot can attack by throwing soda bubbles in any direction

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. No specific physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is known for polished animation and platforming mechanics but exact movement parameters are not published in TCRF or Wikipedia entries.
